---
title: ""
author: Juan Henao
date: '`r format(Sys.time(), "%d %B, %Y")`'
description: ""
title-block-banner: "black"
quarto:
  components:
    panel-tabset:
      max_items: 10
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    anchor-sections: true
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    theme: cerulean
editor: visual
---
